sprint: Creator Authoring Fidelity Check -- do Builder themes show properly in Creator?
task: A real end-to-end authoring test, not a bug report: authored a real World through World Builder v2's real ProjectModel/ProjectCompiler APIs (a Frame with a distinct wall tone/border colour assigned to its Place, a Text Experience caption, a Shape Experience), ran a real headless Build, imported the compiled package into a fresh Creator page through the real production import path, and drove Creation Flow into the Workspace exactly as a Story Author would. Found and fixed two real bugs at the root. (1) A Theme Author's chosen Frame Variation (representation.defaultFrame, compiled into every published package) was never applied to a freshly-created page -- Frame Variation has always been a per-card override renderer/slideRenderer.js reads from slide.metadata.cardOverrides.artwork.frameVariation, and nothing ever seeded that override from the Representation's own default. Confirmed by pixel-sampling: the wall showed the System Default cream, not the Theme Author's actual chosen colour. Fixed with one new seeding helper in js/creationFlow.js, called from both Start Creating and Change Representation, that never overwrites a Story Author's own hand-picked choice. Verified: the wall tone and frame border now render exactly as authored, both in the editor and in Publish Studio. (2) Selecting a World-owned Scene Object (a Theme-authored Layer Pack entry) left the PREVIOUS CardDesigner section's controls visible and interactive underneath the 'This is part of the World' disclosure banner, since js/contextPanel.js never hid the prior tab before rendering the disclosure. Fixed with one added _hideAllTabs() call. A third suspected bug (a Shape Experience failing to render) turned out to be a test-script artifact -- the real Add-a-Shape UI already sets the required contentKind correctly; re-verified the real authoring path renders the shape at its exact authored colour. Verified via full regression across the entire existing Creator Playwright suite plus both goldenBuild.js suites, all passing unchanged. See CLAUDE.md's matching entry for the full account.
